creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

the system is 10.3-RELEASE-p11.

I had installed virtualbox-ose and virtualbox-ose-kmod version 4.3.38 and FreeBSD was running stable.

After upgrade virtualbox-ose and virtualbox-ose-kmod to version 5.1.6 everything seems to work the sam, but I get random reboots now, after about an hour, or after 30 mins, or after 2 hours.

Regards,
vermaden
